'''''Mon Casima''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of a hastily assembled force of New Republic warships dispatched to [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Mon Casima'' is never described as a specific class of Mon Calamari cruiser. The "Mon" aspect of its name has been used on both [[MC80a Star Cruiser]]s and [[MC80B Star Cruiser]]s.

It was mis-identified as ''Mon Carima'' in the [[Adumar: Pilots Wanted]] article.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
